title: Ninja Weapons
description: This is the new Ninja Mod! Add weapons and tools used by Ninja such as Ninja Sword, Kunai, Shuriken, Makibishi, etc.
body:
![ninjaweaponslogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdca07cc4633f1e07ee260867721da9f225816ea.png)

Experience a new style of play in Minecraft with weapons and tools that were actually used by the ninja. Players can also get the Ninja Manual, which gives them ninja-themed special effects to enhance their abilities!

This mod aims to be a vanilla like.
I will not implement excessive effects that destroy the game balance, so you may think it is plain, but i hope you will enjoy it.

Ninja Sword, Tekkokagi, and Kunai to be added with this mod are compatible with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat).

English and Japanese are available.

<details>
<summary>ChangeLog</summary>

<details>
<summary>v1.19.2</summary>

- Fixed an issue that could cause blurred weapon textures in some environments

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.19.1</summary>

- Adjusted appearance of items in third-person view
  
> Adjust the position of holding Ninja Sword

> Adjust the position of holding Sai

> Adjust the position and size of holding Jitte

> Adjust Tekagi size

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.19.0</summary>
  
- Added new weapon Sai
> Sai is a melee weapon with 4 attack power, 2.8 attack speed and max durability 512.

> It is so famous that it has become a symbol of ninja weapons because it was used by fictional ninjas, but there is actually no record of it being used by real ninjas.

- Added new weapon Jitte
> Jitte is a melee weapon with 5 attack power, 2.2 attack speed and max durability 512.

> It is a blunt weapon similar in shape to a Sai, and is characterized by having a protrusion that holds the sword in place only on one side.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.18.2</summary>
  
- Fixed critical issue that prevented Server from starting

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.18.1</summary>
  
- Kunai can be launched from a dispenser.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.18.0</summary>
  
- Added new weapon Tessen
> Tessen is a melee weapon with 6 attack power, 2 attack speed and max durability 512.

> Right-click to prevent enemy attacks as well as Shield.

> Tessen(鉄扇) is a japanese hand fan made of iron for combat use.

> Originally, this weapon was designed to be closed and used for poking and punching, but this mod employs it in an open slashing style.

> Tessen is a coral blade motion when Better Combat is installed.

- Added new weapon Takeyari
> Takeyari is a melee weapon with 6 attack power, 1.2 attack speed and max durability 256.

> Takeyari is a spear motion when Better Combat is installed.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.17.2</summary>
  
- Toribiho Update
> Toribiho flames now set the block on fire.

> Toribiho flames spread rate has been increased by 10%.

> Toribiho increased the number of flames it fires at one time from two to three.

> Increased Velocity of Toriboho flames by 50%.

- Shuriken Update
> Increased velocity of Shuriken, Kashaken, Bo Shuriken and Dokuken by 10%.

> Ninja Manual:Daho velocity enhancement reduced from 30% to 25%.

- Horokuhiya stack limit reduced from 64 to 16

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.17.1</summary>
  
- Fixed an issue that would cause the game to crash

- Changed Japanese Tooltips for some items

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.17.0</summary>
  
- Added new weapon Taikoku Hiya

> A projectile weapon that produces a small explosion and flame that does not destroy the block after 4 seconds.

> Stings against block, but explodes instantly if it touches Entity.

> Equipped with gunpowder for propulsion, so it flies straight.

- Added new weapon Bo Shuriken
> It is an alternative to Shuriken.

> The majority of shurikens actually used by the ninja were in the form of sticks.

- Added new weapon Dokuken
> A weapon coated with poison in Bo Shuriken.

> 50% chance to apply Poison I for 8 seconds, 10% chance to apply Poison II for 8 seconds.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.16.1</summary>
  
- Tetsubishi and Mokubishi no longer damage players during Sneaking

> No more unintentional damage when trying to collect.

- Models of Tetsubishi and Mokubishi were changed

- Tetsubishi was disappearing in 1 minute, modified to disappear in 2 minutes

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.16.0</summary>
  
- Added new item Ninja Manual:Onmitsu

> The effect is a 200% increase in movement speed when Sneaking.

- Slightly increased chance of obtaining Ninja Manuals

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.15.4</summary>
  
- Fixed an issue where the damage dealt by Fundotsubute was not reduced below 2.

- Fundotsubute can be used with dispensers.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.15.3</summary>
  
- Fundotsubute Update
> Changed Fundotsubute item texture.

> Changed Fundotsubute projectile model.

> Changed the behavior of Fundotsubute projectiles.

> Added sound when hit by a block or Entity.

> The condition to do 4 damage was changed from within 4 ticks to within 3 ticks.

> The condition to do 3 damage was changed from within 8 ticks to within 6 ticks.

> The condition to do 2 damage was changed from within 20 ticks to within 15 ticks.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.15.2</summary>
  
- Tekkokagi attack speed reduced from 3.2 to 2.8

- Fundotsubute bullet velocity reduced by 20%

- Tetsubishi Slowness duration increased from 5 seconds to 6 seconds.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.15.1</summary>
  
- Bokken can now be crafted using various types of logs.

- Fixed Dispenser issue.

> Fixed an issue that caused the game to crash when firing Shuriken and Kashaken with Dispenser.

> Fixed an issue where Shuriken, Kashaken, and Horokuhiya did not sound when fired with Dispenser.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.15.0</summary>
  
- Added new weapon Bokken
> Bokken is a weapon with 4 attack power, 1.6 attack speed and max durability 256.

> Bokken is an alternative to Wooden Sword, but with Better Combat installed it becomes a Katana motion, which is a clear differentiator.

- Added new weapon Shikoro
> Shikoro is a weapon with 5 attack power, 2.4 attack speed and max durability 512.

> Equivalent mining performance to Iron Axe.

> Shikoro is a sickle motion when Better Combat is installed.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.14.1</summary>
  
- Toribiho Updates
  
> Adjusted the position of flame generation when used offhand.

> Smaller flames to make it easier to see the first-person screen.

> The flame now looks progressively larger.

> Toribiho recipe no longer requires Black Powder, but creates an initial durability value of 1.

> The durability value that can be recovered with Black Powder was reduced from 150 to 100.

> The durability value that can be recovered with Gun Powder was reduced from 30 to 25.

- Ninja Manual:Enton movement speed increase effect has been increased from 20% to 30%.

</details>


<details>
<summary>v1.14.0</summary>
  
- Torinoko Updates!

> Changed Torinoko smoke textures.

> Changed the movement and amount of smoke produced by Torinoko.

> Changed Torinoko smoke to apply 1 second of blindness.

- Added new tool Torinoko (Black Smoke)

> This is Torinoko which generates black smoke.

> Apply 3 seconds of Blindness.

> Almost identical to Torinoko, but this one applies 3 seconds of Blindness.

- Added new item Ninja Manual:Enton

> Having it disables Torinoko Blindness.

> If you are within range of Torinoko smoke, your movement speed increases by 20%.

> This effect lasts for 5 seconds after going out of range.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.13.0</summary>
  
- Makibishi Update!

> Changed the model to a better one.

> Fixed issue where Makibishi was buried in the ground.

> The number of Iron Nuggets required for crafting has been reduced to 5, and the number of Makibishi that can be created has been reduced to 1.

> Time to spontaneous disappearance decreased from 3 minutes to 2 minutes.

> Makibishi removal can be done by sneaking and approaching instead of right click.

> Makibishi is renamed to Tetsubishi.

- Added new weapon Mokubishi

> Mokubishi is Makibishi made of wood.

> Lower performance than Tetsubishi, but easier to mass produce.

> Deals 1 damage to surrounding MOBs and grants Slowness for 2 seconds.

> Mokubishi will disappear spontaneously in 1 minute.

- Changed Tooltip for some items.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.12.4</summary>
  
- Fixed issue where Torinoko smoke was not displayed

- Fixed issue where added weapon did not play Better Combat motion

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.12.3</summary>
  
- Modified Tekkokagi model

> Curvature has been added to make it look more like claw.

- Changed wording of Tooltips

> Similar to Vanilla's Tooltips for simplicity.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.12.2</summary>
  
- Fixed issue where Better Combat dagger motion was not applied to Kunai

- Shuriken and Kashaken now stick deeper into the block

- Languages were set for Shuriken, Kashaken and Makibishi projectiles

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.12.1</summary>
  
- Shuriken and Kahsaken updates

> Shuriken and Kashaken now stick in the block. However, they cannot be picked up.

> Added sound effects when Shuriken and Kashaken hit mobs.

> Increased Velocity of Shuriken and Kashaken by 16%.

> Ninja Manual:Dahou Velocity enhancement reduced from 50% to 30%.

> Easier to use Shuriken and Kashaken even if you don't have the Ninja Manual.

- Kunai throwing damage increased from 5 to 6

- Fixed issue with Kunai mining speed being Stone Tool instead of Iron Tool

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.12.0</summary>
  
- Added new weapon Kunai

> Kunai is a weapon with 4 attack power and 3.2 attack speed.

> It can also be thrown, dealing 5 damage.

> Thrown Kunai can be picked up, but its durability value is reduced by 2.

> Equivalent performance to Iron Shovel.

> It has similar melee performance to Tekkokagi, but Kunai is treated as a Shovel, so it cannot make sweep attacks, and it does not gain Sharpness as an enchantment.

> Better Combat dagger motion is supported.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.11.3</summary>
  
- Tekkokagi now supports [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

> Claw motion of BetterCombat will be played.

- Considering the environment of BetterCombat, the attack speed was too fast, so we adjusted it

> Tekkokagi attack speed decreased from 4.0 to 3.2.

> Ninja Sword attack speed reduced from 3.2 to 2.4, one-handed attack speed bonus reduced from 0.8 to 0.4.

> In Vanilla's environment, there is invincibility time, so a slight reduction in attack speed has little effect.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.11.2</summary>
  
- Torinoko smoke now effective against piglins and skeletons
  
> Some enemies were ineffective because their AI was different from that of common MOBs, but they are now effective

> However, be aware that skeletons may sense the player's movement and chase after them.

- Fundotubute bullets changed from 8 to 12

> The rate of spread has been increased to match the increase in bullets, allowing more than one enemy to be attacked.

- Added tooltips to some items

> Easier to understand how to use items with special effects.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.11.1</summary>
  
- Toribiho and Uchitake projectiles now destroy some blocks, such as plants and cobweb
  
> This change makes it easier to flame the ground with Uchitake.
  
> It can also be used to clean up large quantities of cobweb.

- Adjust the position of the flame generated by Horokuhiya

> Corrected a situation where flames were being generated on the air when flames were generated on the wall of a block, instead of the wall being on fire.

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>v1.11.0</summary>
  
- Added new throwing weapon Fundotsubute
  
> Throw 8 bullets at a time, spread horizontally.
  
> Maximum damage inflicted is 4, and the damage goes down to 1 depending on the flying distance.

- Torinoko Updates

> Torinoko now requires a 20 second cool time for use.

> It is now possible to throw three at the same time when used in a crouching position.

> Torinoko's smoke range slightly expanded.

- Minor changes

> Optimize Ninja Manual's effect grant.

> 15% slower speed of climbing walls using Tekagi.

> Add a new tooltip explaining the effects of Ninja Manual:Katon.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.10.1</summary>
  
- Shuriken, Kashaken, and Horokuhiya can now be fired from the dispenser

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.10.0</summary>
  
- Added new item Ninja Manual:Ansatsu
  
> Double the damage inflicted on Mob from behind.
  
> Can be obtained from Woodland Mansion, Pillager Outpost, Dungeon, Buried Treasure

- Added new item Ninja Manual:Hishingyo

> No more falling damage up to 10 blocks high

> Can be obtained from Ancient City, Stronghold, Dungeon, Buried Treasure

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.9.1</summary>
  
- Enhanced Ninja Sword
  
> Added the ability to increase attack power by 3 and attack speed by 0.8 only if the off-hand is empty.

- Added new item Ninja Manual:Hishingyo

> Enhanced Ninja Manual : Katon

> The effect of increased movement speed has been increased from 15% to 20%.

</details>

<details>
<summary>v1.9.0</summary>
  
- Added new Food Kikatsugan
  
> Kikatsugan is a food that restores 8 Food Points and 20 Food Saturation.
  
> It can be eaten in half the time of other foods.

> It also removes Poison, Wither, Nausea, and Hunger from the player.

- Added new Item Starch

> Starch is a necessary item for the crafting of Kikatsugan.

</details>
  
</details>

# **Weapon**

<details>
<summary>Ninja Sword - 忍刀</summary>

![ninjasword](https://i.imgur.com/wVzxiyj.png)

A high-performance melee weapon with 7 attack power, 2.4 attack speed and max durability 1561.

Increases attack power by 3 and attack speed by 0.4 only if off-hand is empty.

This item cannot be crafted and can only be obtained from treasure chests at a low rate.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Sword motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Sai - 釵</summary>
  
Image is in preparation.

Sai is a melee weapon with 4 attack power, 2.8 attack speed and max durability 512.

It is so famous that it has become a symbol of ninja weapons because it was used by fictional ninjas, but there is actually no record of it being used by real ninjas.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Dagger motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Jitte - 十手</summary>
  
Image is in preparation.

Jitte is a melee weapon with 5 attack power, 2.2 attack speed and max durability 512.

It is a blunt weapon similar in shape to a Sai, and is characterized by having a protrusion that holds the sword in place only on one side.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Sword motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tekkokagi - 手甲鉤</summary>
  
![tekkokagi](https://i.imgur.com/5NDM3yY.png)

Tekkokagi is a claw-like weapon with 4 attack power, 2.8 attack speed and max durability 512.

Although its attack power is low, it has excellent DPS due to its fast attack speed.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Claw motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tessen - 鉄扇</summary>
  
![tessen](https://i.imgur.com/aXBZmtx.png)

![tessen](https://i.imgur.com/zxmcrxl.png)

Tessen is a melee weapon with 6 attack power, 2 attack speed and max durability 512.

Right-click to prevent enemy attacks as well as Shield.

Tessen(鉄扇) is a japanese hand fan made of iron for combat use.

Originally, this weapon was designed to be closed and used for poking and punching, but this mod employs it in an open slashing style.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Coral Blade motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Takeyari - 竹槍</summary>
  
![takeyari](https://i.imgur.com/4rryc2f.png)

Takeyari is a melee weapon with 6 attack power, 1.2 attack speed and max durability 256.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Spear motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Bokken - 木刀</summary>
  
![bokken](https://i.imgur.com/IduVyqD.png)

Bokken is an alternative to Wooden Sword, with 4 attack power, 1.6 attack speed and max durability 256.

Bokken becomes Katana motion when Better Combat is installed, so it can be differentiated from Wooden Sword.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Katana motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shikoro - 錣</summary>
  
![shikoro](https://i.imgur.com/MDq6W8K.png)

Shikoro is a weapon with 5 attack power, 2.4 attack speed and max durability 512.

Equivalent mining performance to Iron Axe.

Shikoro is a saw used by the ninja to invade enemy territory.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Sickle motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Kunai - クナイ</summary>
  
![kunai1](https://i.imgur.com/ZbORjle.gif)

![Kunai2](https://i.imgur.com/JKFSl5n.gif)

Kunai is a weapon with 4 attack power, 3.2 attack speed and max durability 512.

It can also be thrown, dealing 6 damage.

Thrown Kunai can be picked up, but its durability value is reduced by 2.

Kunai can be used as a mining tool because its performance is equivalent to Iron Shovel.

It has similar melee performance to Tekkokagi, but Kunai is treated as a Shovel, so it cannot make sweep attacks, and it does not gain Sharpness as an enchantment.


While Kunai are depicted as weapons in anime, video games, and other fictions, in reality they were used as tools for dig up dirt and as aids for climbing walls.
However, it was also used as a weapon for throwing and cutting at enemies in emergency situations.

_If you have Better Combat installed, this is the Dagger motion_
</details>

<details>
<summary>Shuriken - 手裏剣</summary>

![shuriken1](https://i.imgur.com/uwc0h2B.gif)

![shuriken](https://i.imgur.com/wWQCevD.gif)

A throwing weapon that deals 6 damage when it hits an enemy.

It has a short range, but can be used while moving quickly.

After one second after firing, the damage inflicted is halved.

Shuriken can be used with Dispenser.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Kashaken - 火車剣</summary>
  
![kashaken1](https://i.imgur.com/XCDnVkY.gif)

![kashaken2](https://i.imgur.com/iF2ePaS.gif)

Throwing weapon with Black Powder attached to Shuriken.

It has 1 more attack power than Shuriken, but velocity is 10% slower.

If it hits a Mob, it will set it on fire for 6 seconds.

After one second after firing, the damage inflicted is halved.

Kashaken can be used with Dispenser.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Bo Shuriken - 棒手裏剣</summary>
  
_**Gif in preparation**_

It is an alternative to Shuriken.

The majority of shurikens actually used by the ninja were in the form of sticks.

Bo Shuriken can be used with Dispenser.

Bo(棒) means Stick.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Dokuken - 毒剣</summary>
  
_**Gif in preparation**_

A weapon coated with poison in Bo Shuriken.

50% chance to apply Poison I for 8 seconds, 10% chance to apply Poison II for 8 seconds.

Dokuken can be used with Dispenser.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Tetsubishi - 鉄菱</summary>

![tetsubishi1](https://i.imgur.com/4Whiy7u.gif)

![tetsubishi2](https://i.imgur.com/VDDjeIU.gif)

Tetsubishi is a weapon that is placed on the ground.

It sprays backward, dealing 2 damage and Slowness for 6 seconds to any Mob it comes in contact with.

It can be removed but not recovered and reused.

Removal can be done by approaching Tetsubishi with Sneaking.

It disappears spontaneously after 2 minutes from the time it is thrown.

When used while sneaking, it throws forward. 


Makibishi is a tool that the ninja scatters on the ground in order to escape from a pursuit, making it impossible for the opponent to run after stepping on it.

Tetsubishi is Makibishi made of iron.

Tetsu(鉄) means Iron.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mokubishi - 木菱</summary>

![mokubishi](https://i.imgur.com/ZKkxugr.gif)

Mokubishi is a lower performance alternative to Tetsubishi.

It sprays backward, dealing 1 damage and Slowness for 2 seconds to any Mob it comes in contact with.

It can be removed but not recovered and reused.

Removal can be done by approaching Mokubishi with Sneaking.

It disappears spontaneously after 1 minutes from the time it is thrown.

When used while sneaking, it throws forward. 


Mokubishi is a wooden Makibishi.

Moku(木) means Wood.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Horoku Hiya - 焙烙火矢</summary>

![hourokuhiya](https://i.imgur.com/UAoC1Sr.gif)

A projectile weapon that creates an explosion that does not destroy blocks and produces flames over a wide area.

Horoku Hiya can be used with Dispenser.

Horoku(焙烙) are tableware used in old Japan.

A weapon consisting of two Horoku together and filled with gunpowder is called a Horoku Hiya(焙烙火矢), which posed a threat in Japan, where most buildings are made of wood.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Taikoku Hiya - 大国火矢</summary>

_**Gif in preparation**_

A projectile weapon that produces a small explosion and flame that does not destroy the block after 4 seconds.

Stings against block, but explodes instantly if it touches Entity.

Equipped with gunpowder for propulsion, so it flies straight.

Taikoku Hiya can be used with Dispenser. 
</details>

<details>
<summary>Toribiho - 捕火方</summary>

![toribihou](https://i.imgur.com/9i1a2Mj.gif)

![toribihou](https://i.imgur.com/XFSBOzB.gif)

Toribiho is a flamethrower-like weapon. Max durability is 300.

A mob touched by the flame will take 4 damage and will be on fire for 10 seconds.

Flames destroy plants and cobweb.

It can be used for 7.5 seconds from the max durability and can be reloaded by consuming Black Powder or Gun Powder after the endurance value runs out.

Black Powder restores 100 durability, Gun powder restores 25 durability.

If you have both Black Powde and Gun Powder, Black Powder is consumed first.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Fundo Tsubute - 分銅つぶて</summary>

![fundotsubute](https://i.imgur.com/9gZyKgP.gif)

![fundotsubute](https://i.imgur.com/dA08qQ9.gif)

Throwing weapon that disperses 12 bullets horizontally at a time.

Maximum damage inflicted is 4, and the damage goes down to 1 depending on the flying distance.

Fundo Tsubute can be used with Dispenser.

＊Within 3 Ticks of throwing it does 4 damage, within 6 Ticks it does 3 damage, within 15 Ticks it does 2 damage, and after that it does 1 damage.
</details>

# **Tool**

<details>
<summary>Tekagi - 手鉤</summary>

![tekagi](https://i.imgur.com/6PK3XGa.gif)

![tekagi](https://i.imgur.com/EpJ3vVu.gif)

This item allows you to climb walls.

Holding it in both hands increases the speed of climbing a wall by 1.5 times compared to one hand.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Uchitake - 打竹</summary>

![uchitake](https://i.imgur.com/Q8dphqI.gif)

![uchitake](https://i.imgur.com/5EEByDm.gif)

This item is like a long-range version of Flint and Steel, sending out sparks of fire that burn the point of impact.

sparks destroy plants and cobweb.

If it hits a Mob, it will set it on fire for 5 seconds.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Torinoko - 鳥の子</summary>

![torinoko](https://i.imgur.com/9P7NjJF.gif)

![torinoko](https://i.imgur.com/6MpRaUW.gif)

Torinoko is a tool like the smoke bomb.

A wide area is covered with white smoke, the MOB loses sight of the enemy for a certain period of time, and Blindness is applied.

Blindness lasts for 1 second after leaving the area of effect.

Requires a 20 second cool time to use.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Torinoko (Black Smoke) - 鳥の子 (黒煙)</summary>

![black](https://i.imgur.com/Lezn5rH.gif)

This is Torinoko generate black smoke.

Almost identical to Torinoko, but this one applies 3 seconds of Blindness.
</details>

# **Ninja Manual**

The Ninja Manual is an item that has a special effect when possessed in the inventory.

Multiple possession does not duplicate the effect. 

It can be obtained from treasure chests in each structure.

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Suiton - 忍術書：水遁の術</summary>

![suiton](https://i.imgur.com/25jW6tp.gif)

![suiton](https://i.imgur.com/OxKwh52.gif)

Increases your movement speed in water by 75%.

Suiton(水遁) is one of the Tonjutsu(遁術) techniques used by the ninja to escape, and is an escape technique that utilizes water.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Katon - 忍術書：火遁の術</summary>

![katon](https://i.imgur.com/rCMJqSS.gif)

![katon](https://i.imgur.com/7uK7l76.gif)

Increases your movement speed by 20% when flames are present within a 6 block radius.

The targets of the flames are MOBs on fire, blocks on fire, and lava.

This effect lasts for 5 seconds after leaving the range.

Katon(火遁) is one of the Tonjutsu(遁術) techniques used by the ninja to escape, and is an escape technique that utilizes fire.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Daho - 忍術書：打法</summary>
  
![dahou1](https://i.imgur.com/a875bhl.gif)

![dahou2](https://i.imgur.com/r1iifci.gif)

Increases Shuriken damage by 2 and velocity by 25%.

In addition, the time it takes for Shuriken damage to be halved will be extended from 1 second to 2 seconds.

Daho(打法) is a form of shuriken throwing, and there are various throwing styles with different power and range, such as JikaDaho(直打法) and KaitenDaho(回転打法).
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Ansatsu - 忍術書：暗殺</summary>

![ansatsu](https://i.imgur.com/VKxSQ7W.gif)

Double the damage inflicted on Mob from behind.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Hishingyo - 忍術書：飛神行</summary>

![hishingyo](https://i.imgur.com/AYnG4Uk.gif)

No more falling damage up to 10 blocks high.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Enton - 忍術書：煙遁の術</summary>

![enton](https://i.imgur.com/Jt22Y6e.gif)

Disables Blindness caused by Torinoko smoke.

If you are within range of Torinoko's smoke, your movement speed increases by 20%.

This effect lasts for 5 seconds after leaving the area.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ninja Manual : Onmitsu - 忍術書：隠密</summary>

_**Gif in preparation**_

Movement speed is increased by 200% when sneaking.
</details>

# **Food**

<details>
<summary>Hyorogan - 兵糧丸</summary>

![hyorogan](https://i.imgur.com/SjV3dRT.gif)

Hyorogan is a food that restores 5 Food Points and 15 Food Saturation.

It can be eaten in half the time of other foods.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Kikatsugan - 飢渇丸</summary>

![kikatsugan](https://i.imgur.com/PyotIwy.gif)

Kikatsugan is a food that restores 8 Food Points and 20 Food Saturation.

It can be eaten in half the time of other foods.

It also removes Poison, Wither, Nausea, and Hunger from the player.
</details>

# **Misc**

<details>
<summary>Black Powder - 黒色火薬</summary>

Materials needed to craft items added by Ninja Weapon.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Starch - でん粉</summary>

Starch is a necessary item for the crafting of Kikatsugan.
</details>
